info.description: HTTP API for the AVF vending platform (cmd/api). All `/v1/*` routes require `Authorization: Bearer <JWT>` unless noted (health, optional metrics, Swagger when enabled). Bearer middleware failures use minimal JSON `{"error":{"message":"..."}}` without `error.code`. Most `/v1` handlers use `{"error":{"code":"...","message":"..."}}` (see writeAPIError). **501** list stubs return `not_implemented` plus `capability` and `implemented:false`. **503** `capability_not_configured` is used when optional wiring (MQTT dispatch, commerce persistence, outbox defaults) is missing. Request tracing: responses echo `X-Request-ID` and `X-Correlation-ID` when middleware is enabled.

license.name: License terms apply per your deployment agreement; see repository NOTICE if present.

info.title: AVF Vending HTTP API

get.description: Returns 200 with body `ok` when the process is running. No authentication. Response echoes `X-Request-ID` / `X-Correlation-ID` when sent.
Returns 200 with body `ok` when readiness checks pass. When READINESS_STRICT and dependencies fail, returns **503** with plain text body `not ready` (not the JSON error envelope).
Exposed only when METRICS_ENABLED=true; otherwise the route is not registered (clients may observe connection-level 404).
Served when HTTP_SWAGGER_UI_ENABLED=true. Same JSON the UI loads; no `Authorization` header required.
Browser UI entrypoint when Swagger is enabled; loads `/swagger/doc.json`.
Returns **501** with capability `v1.admin.assignments.list`.
Returns **501** with capability `v1.admin.commands.list`.

Postgres-backed fleet listing when Fleet service is wired. Returns **501** with `not_implemented` when fleet is nil or misconfigured (`v1.admin.machines.list`). Platform admin must supply tenant scope (organization_id on principal) or receives **400** `tenant_scope_required`.

post.description: Routes are **not mounted** unless API_ARTIFACTS_ENABLED=true and object store is configured. Requires org_admin for orgId or platform_admin. Uses sensitive-write rate limiting when HTTP_RATE_LIMIT_SENSITIVE_WRITES_ENABLED=true → **429** `rate_limited`.

put.description: Request body is raw bytes. Required headers: **Content-Length**; optional **Content-Type**, **X-Artifact-SHA256**, **X-Artifact-Filename**. Sensitive-write rate limit may return **429**.

get.description: Returns **501** with capability `v1.admin.ota.list`.
Returns **501** with `not_implemented` and capability `v1.admin.technicians.list` until a repository is wired.

post.description: Commerce routes not mounted when commerce service nil. Requires org on JWT for non-platform users. **Idempotency-Key** or **X-Idempotency-Key** required. Not configured → **503** `capability_not_configured` (`v1.commerce.persistence`). Rate limit → **429**.

parameters.description: machine_id, product_id, slot_index, currency, subtotal_minor, tax_minor, total_minor
parameters.name: body

201.description: Create order and initial vend session

post.summary: Create order and initial vend session

get.description: Optional **slot_index** query (default 0). Response nests `order`, `vend`, and `payment` (nullable).

post.description: When commerce outbox env (topic/event/aggregate) is unset → **503** `capability_not_configured` (`v1.commerce.payment_session.outbox`). Requires idempotency header.

get.description: Returns `{kind, status}` where **status** matches checkout status JSON.

post.description: Idempotency header required for write contract; value not yet used for dedupe on this transition. Illegal state → **409** `illegal_transition`.

Requires **Idempotency-Key** or **X-Idempotency-Key**. Org/platform admin only. When MQTT publisher is missing → **503** `capability_not_configured` (`mqtt_command_dispatch`). Nil RemoteCommands wiring → **500**. Rate limiter may return **429** `rate_limited`.

parameters.description: command_type, payload, desired_state, optional correlation_id, operator_session_id
parameters.name: body

get.description: Mounted when RemoteCommands service is configured. If app wiring is nil, handler returns **500** `internal` (not 503). Optional **limit** query (default 50, max 500).
**sequence** must be a non-negative integer. Unknown sequence → **404** `command_not_found`.

200.description: Get command dispatch status by sequence

get.summary: Get command dispatch status by sequence

get.description: Routes not mounted when operator service is nil. Response is `{"active_session":null}` or `{"active_session":{...}}` (optional `technician_display_name`).

post.description: Actor (TECHNICIAN vs USER) comes from JWT claims only. Optional **force_admin_takeover** (org/platform admin). Conflicts → **409** `active_session_exists`. Technician without assignment checker returns **503** with JSON `code` **assignment_checker_misconfigured** (standard envelope, not capability_not_configured). Rate limit → **429**.
**final_status** empty or ENDED (default) or REVOKED (org/platform admin only). **session_id** may be omitted when an ACTIVE session exists for the machine.

get.description: Requires Bearer JWT and RequireMachineURLAccess(machineId). Invalid UUID in path → **400** from middleware or handler (`invalid_machine_id`). Missing shadow row → **404** `machine_shadow_not_found`.
Returns deduped incident rows from Postgres (fed by `incident.*` telemetry via JetStream workers). Optional `limit` query (default 50, max 500).
Aggregated `telemetry_rollups` only — not raw high-frequency streams. Query `from`/`to` as RFC3339 (default last 24h), `granularity` (`1m` default, `1h`).
Read-only `machine_current_snapshot` row (rollups + shadow projection). **404** when no snapshot exists yet. Not a raw MQTT history API.
Mounted only when operator service is configured. **organization_id** query is required when the caller is platform_admin without tenant org on the JWT.

parameters.description: Required for platform_admin without org scope
parameters.name: organization_id

200.description: List action attributions for a technician

get.summary: List action attributions for a technician

get.description: **user_principal** query parameter is required. Same organization_id rules as technician insights.

parameters.description: Required for platform_admin without org scope
parameters.name: organization_id

200.description: List action attributions for a user principal

get.summary: List action attributions for a user principal

get.description: **501** with capability `v1.orders.org_list`. Same auth and 403 behavior as payments list.

Requires Bearer JWT and RequireOrganizationScope. **501** `not_implemented` with capability `v1.payments.org_list` until implemented. Non-platform callers without org on JWT get **403** from middleware (minimal JSON, no `code`).

BearerAuth.description: Send: Bearer <JWT>. JWT mode is selected by HTTP_AUTH_MODE (hs256 default, rs256_pem, rs256_jwks). 401/403 responses from this layer use JSON {"error":{"message":"..."}} without error.code.
BearerAuth.name: Authorization

tags.description: Operational endpoints such as Prometheus metrics when enabled.
tags.name: Reliability

tags.description: S3-backed artifact APIs (mounted only when API_ARTIFACTS_ENABLED=true).
tags.name: Artifacts

tags.description: Remote command dispatch and receipts (requires MQTT wiring for dispatch).
tags.name: Device

tags.name: Documentation
